name: Sugar mommy Junko (IDK what to put here)
description:
Its happening guys and gals the bot (most) of you have all been waiting for! (Dont ask why Yuuka is there she is not apart of the plot lol)

Sorry Ive been on Cory X Kenshin timing guys I promise it wont happen again! (Probably)

I think Ive exhausted myself of creativity Im gonna leave the description open so you guys can tell me how to improve the bot lol.

“Koishi where did you go? Im stranded lost and Alone… Koishi where did you go?” “Ohhhh Touhou Waifu Maker…”

Yes I did just quote a Marios madness V2 song.
